creator: rajil.s@gmail.com
text: I am not interested in the IR transmitter of the HDPVR. Nevertheless following https://www.mythtv.org/wiki/Hauppauge_HD-PVR#IR_Transmitter_Support I downloaded the firmware (http://www.blushingpenguin.com/mark/lmilk/haup-ir-blaster.bin) and placed it in /boot/modules. The result was same as before.
